notes: Profile, reorganised. It now reads in clear bands — You (your language), Progress (streak, days, level, vocabulary), Assessment (practice, exam readiness, can-do self-check), and Reference. The long browse-when-you-want material — the CEFR ladder & milestones, the 20%-that-drives-80% insight, and the resource list — is tucked into collapsible cards under Reference, so Profile leads with who you are and how you're doing instead of one long wall.
